CREATE TABLE test_generate_ulid (id UInt32, ulid FixedString(26));
SELECT generateULID(1) AS ulid_one, generateULID(2) AS ulid_two;
SELECT ulid, generateULID() AS subquery_ulid FROM (SELECT generateULID(1) AS ulid) AS subquery;
SELECT t1.id, generateULID() FROM (SELECT id FROM test_generate_ulid t1) AS t1;
CREATE TABLE test_nested_generate_ulid (id UInt32, ulid FixedString(26), parent_ulid FixedString(26));
INSERT INTO test_nested_generate_ulid (id, ulid) VALUES (1, generateULID()), (2, generateULID());
SELECT t1.id, t2.ulid AS child_ulid, generateULID() AS new_ulid FROM test_nested_generate_ulid t1 JOIN test_nested_generate_ulid t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*), generateULID() FROM test_generate_ulid GROUP BY id;
